text:
The department shall issue specialty license plates for female active or former members of the United States armed forces, Texas National Guard, or Texas State Guard. The license plates must include the words “Woman Veteran” in red.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.317 (Surviving Spouses of Disabled Veterans Specialty License Plates) by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 161 (S.B. 1093 ), Sec. 22.001(52), eff. September 1, 2013.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.318 — Women Veterans

The department shall issue specialty license plates for female active or former members of the United States armed forces, Texas National Guard, or Texas State Guard. The license plates must include the words “Woman Veteran” in red.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.317 (Surviving Spouses of Disabled Veterans Specialty License Plates) by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 161 (S.B. 1093 ), Sec. 22.001(52), eff. September 1, 2013.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1281 (H.B.1178), Sec. 4, eff. June 17, 2011.*
